title: Earache in Athletes: 7 Teas to the Solution
description: Achillea millefolium teas have been traditionally used to help alleviate earaches due to their anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant contains constituents like sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and essential oils, which work together to reduce swelling and fight off infections in the ear. When you experience an earache, try making a tea by steeping 1-2 teaspoons of dried Achillea millefolium leaves in a cup of boiling water for 5-7 minutes. Strain the liquid and u...
